title: Repealed by Acts 1997, No. 1409, 4, eff. Aug. 1, 1997.
doc_html:
PART VIII.  DISCRIMINATION IN EMPLOYMENT ON ACCOUNT

OF RACE, COLOR, RELIGION, SEX, DISABILITY, OR

NATIONAL ORIGIN

§1006.  Repealed by Acts 1997, No. 1409, §4, eff. Aug. 1, 1997.
